content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 74% deployed with modest unrealized loss. Multiple positions held just 0 days - these are fresh entries without established SLs, which is the #1 priority to fix today. Broader tape shows defensive rotation into FMCG/Pharma/Power, but VIX at 18.6 and an open ADANIPOWER order from yesterday still pending suggest risk-off posture is warranted. No new entries - tighten risk on what we have.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+35% PAT), PSU bank sector leadership, NNPA 0.13%. Entry at 81.50, CMP 78.94 (-3.1%). SL at 74.50 = ~8.6% from entry / ~5.6% from CMP (below recent swing low 72.31 would be cleaner but ATR-wider SL justified on fresh position). Target 88 (above 52w high 77 - breakout extension). R:R from CMP ~2:1. Capital raise overhang caps upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "new_target": 1075.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY), retail disbursements +32%, JPM OW TP 1000. Entry 984, CMP 989.95. SL 940 ~4.5% below entry, just below Apr 17 close 923 swing. Target 1075 (below 52w high 1141, pre-result rally). R:R ~1.8:1. Provision write-back caveat limits aggressive target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position. Gold in consolidation after sharp correction; SL 118.50 below recent swing lows (~120 on Apr 2). Target 135 achievable if geopolitical tensions resurge. Keeping as portfolio insurance given VIX 18.6."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "In profit +2.1%. Nabha acquisition EPS accretive, summer demand tailwind, Q4 expected May 13. SL 1590 just below prior breakout level 1570 (Apr 17 high), ~3.7% below entry. Target 1850 (analyst consensus 2000-2300 range). R:R ~3:1. Power cluster representation through TORNTPOWER + NTPC - decline ADANIPOWER pending order."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 beat (+27% PAT, best revenue in decade, 26.3% EBITDA margin), debt-free, +8% to 52w high. Entry 1412.94 near local top - risk of consolidation post gap-up. SL 1365 ~3.4% below entry protects against gap-fill. Target 1520 extension. R:R ~1.9:1. Rich valuation (P/E 72-80x) caps target ambition."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 25 (2 days) - binary event. Strong provisional: deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%. Universal bank license re-rating lever. SL 995 below Apr 17 high 994.80 / recent consolidation zone, ~5.1% below entry. Target 1140. Exit before or just after earnings to avoid gap risk if concall commentary weak."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Q4 April 29 (6 days) - binary event. Best-in-class pharma growth (+46% 1Y), FDA Chantilly audit clean. Stock at fresh 52w high. SL 650 just below Apr 20 close 664 / breakout level, ~4.5% below entry. Target 745. R:R ~2:1. Gagillapur OAI is an overhang."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2550.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Q4 April 28 (5 days). In profit +0.9%. FMCG defensive rotation active. SL 2290 ~3.5% below entry, below Apr 20 close 2231 wider wick. Target 2550 below 52w high. R:R ~2:1. Sector still -6% YTD so keeping target modest."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Fresh breakout above descending trendline, summer demand tailwind. Entry 404.50, CMP 402 (-0.6%). SL 385 below 20-SMA 378 and prior support zone, ~4.8% below entry. Target 435 (analyst consensus 400-460). R:R ~2.3:1. Q4 May 15. Power cluster weight check: TORNTPOWER+NTPC only moderate exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CANCEL the pending BUY 230x ADANIPOWER @ 214 placed 1528m ago. Power cluster already represented by TORNTPOWER + NTPC; adding ADANIPOWER would create cluster concentration risk (three power names). Book already 74% deployed, remaining deployable only 64k. Rejecting fresh power-theme adds today."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Underwater -3.1% but thesis intact (Q4 beat, PSU momentum). SL 74.50 gives room without violating 6% max rule."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 940.00,
      "reasoning": "Modest green, strong results. Let it develop toward 1075 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge - keep as portfolio insurance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "reasoning": "In profit +2.1%. SL to 1590 locks downside just below recent consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "reasoning": "Entered near 52w high post-results; gap-fill risk exists. Tight SL warranted."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Binary event April 25. Consider exit if gap-down on results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "reasoning": "Binary event April 29. Momentum at 52w high - tight SL to protect."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "reasoning": "Binary event April 28. Defensive rotation supports."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh breakout setup intact; allow room to 20-SMA."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA (buyback floor at 1475), AXISBANK (Q4 Apr 25), ADANIENSOL (near 52w high, Q4 today) - interesting but NOT adding due to deployment discipline (74% deployed). PIRAMALFIN and DEEPAKNTR look like overextended gap-ups on weak volume - skip. ELECON/TRITURBINE extreme moves - avoid chasing. Will reassess next cycle after some current positions resolve (earnings events Apr 25-29).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Critical observation: all 9 positions were held 0 days with zero SL/target - this tick's primary job was installing risk parameters on every one. Now done. Cluster check: Financials = MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK (~25% of capital) - at cap, no more. Power = TORNTPOWER + NTPC (~11%) - have room but canceling ADANIPOWER pending order to avoid cluster stack. Pharma = GRANULES alone - fine. FMCG = NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR (~6%) - fine. Next 6 trading days have 4 earnings events on held names (AUBANK 25th, HUL 28th, GRANULES 29th, maybe others) - binary risk concentrated; if market turns risk-off pre-events, will consider booking partials."
}
